name: Spinach-Stuffed Acorn Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Halve the acorn squash widthwise, remove the top stem and discard the seeds.
3. In a skillet, sauté onions in olive oil until translucent.
4. Add finely chopped spinach, bread crumbs or wheat germ, salt, pepper, and nutmeg to the skillet with onions. Mix well.
5. Fill the squash shells with the mixture.
6. Place the halves into a deep oven-proof dish, cover with foil, add 2-3 inches of water, and bake for 40 minutes at 375°F (190°C) or until tender.
